ModMetaData.name: Common Mod Compatibility Patches
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
A small collection of runtime compatibility patches for commonly used RimWorld mods. Every target-mod patch is dynamically detected at startup: if the corresponding mod/type/method is absent, the patch is skipped silently.
Current patches: - Allow Tool: guard stale cached Haul Urgently things before RimWorld hauling APIs. - Build From Inventory / Replace Stuff: guard vanilla pathfinder reservation notifications for inventory-held or unspawned reservation targets. - Build From Inventory: clamp impossible HaulToContainer reservation stack counts after inventory drops. - Replace Stuff / TinyTweaks: guard Replace Stuff automatic bridge placement helper against null/invalid blueprint contexts. - Replace Stuff / TinyTweaks: guard Replace Stuff over-mineable blueprint helper against null/invalid blueprint contexts. - TinyTweaks: skip auto-rebuild blueprint placement when a launched building has no previous map context. - RimStory: guard broken saved individual-death anniversary events (ADead) with missing/invalid pawns and suppress exceptions from that event path.
Target mods are listed under loadAfter, not as dependencies, so this mod can stay enabled even when some target mods are not installed.
